summary: Excellent audience recording of a steadily building show, highlighted by a moving Comes A Time.
review: Both reviewers praise the tape’s clarity – calling it “pin‑drop sweet” and as good as an audience recording can get – while noting that the performance builds momentum throughout both sets. The playing is described as fine with beautiful moments, especially the rendition of Comes A Time, though some jams feel a bit short. Overall the show is viewed very positively.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical performance (good to great) combined with an exceptionally clear audience recording yields a high overall rating despite only two detailed reviews.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners describe the sound as crisp, pin‑drop sweet and as good as an audience tape can get.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert is said to build and gain strength as it progresses, with intricate jams that may be brief but add momentum and beauty.
